title: airpure Air-O-Matic Air Freshener Refill, 250ml, Automatic Spray Fragrance for Home, Office, Kitchens and Anywhere for a Burst of Fresh Scent - Sparkling Berry Fragrance
features: NO ANIMAL TESTING - No ingredients in these air freshener refills has been d on animals. They do not contain any animal products, by-products, or derivatives and are registered with the Vegan Society.

LONG LASTING & VERSATILE - Each refill contains 250ml of air freshener for up to 60 days, depending on air freshener machine setting. Ideal for home use in bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchen and hallways, the office or wherever fragrance is needed.

NO ANIMAL TESTING - No ingredients in these air freshener refills has been tested on animals. They do not contain any animal products, by-products, or derivatives and are registered with the Vegan Society.
RANGE OF FRESH SCENTS - Choose from a variety of fragrances to enhance the atmosphere of all your environments and help create the ambience of any room.

WON’T WET FURNISHINGS - The Air-O-Matic refills contain no added water so it is not a wet spray. Instead, you get a fine mist that permeates the air without heavy moisture to dampen, furniture or carpets.
description: Product Description "DECORATE THE AIR As part of the Airpure family of products, the Air-O-Matic air freshener refill offers high-quality fragrance at an exceptional value. You get a consistent mist of fresh scent to liven up whatever room you use it in. It’s 100% vegan and cruelty-free. Choose from a variety of scents. Enjoy our commitment to customer service with our 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, we’ll gladly provide a replacement or refund. " Ingredients Air Freshener
